es.exampleTranslation: In all likelihood it will arrive tomorrow.

it.exampleTranslation: In all likelihood it arrives tomorrow.

bridge.note: Both stack certainty on probability, but they quantify differently: Italian counts every probability (ogni), Spanish sweeps up all of it (toda). Small words, reliable error.

interference.es_to_it: Spanish 'toda' pulls 'con tutta probabilità' — Italian quantifies with EVERY (ogni), not all.
interference.it_to_es: Italian 'ogni' pulls 'con cada probabilidad' — Spanish totalises: con toda.

review.notes: From Joe's Italian teacher's prepositions crash course, 2026-07-16. ES pairing chosen by Claude, unverified — reviewer to confirm.
